issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The effect checks if the Leader has {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type, not if a card is on board.
First action is wrong. Should add up to 1 card from TOP of deck to TOP of Life cards (FlipLife destination), not to hand (SearchDeck).
Second action missing. Must add up to 1 card from opponent's Life cards to owner's hand. Current FlipLife only handles your own Life.
Second effect is completely unrelated to card text. '[Trigger] Play a card with power 6000 or less' does not appear in the official effect.

condition.name: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
